title: 7pcs Baby Shower Cookie Cutter Set, Onesie, Bib, Rattle, Bottle, Carriage, Foot and Letter Cookie Cutters Fondant Biscuit Tools for Baking Baby Shower Birthday Party Decorations
features: Product Contents: You will receive 7 pieces baby shower cookie cutter set: onesie, bib, rattle, bottle, carriage, foot and letter. Each 0.97-inches deep cutter creates professional fondant or biscuit shapes.

Premium Material: This cookie cutter sets for baking is made of safe material - safety stainless steel, with a smooth surface for smooth and clear cutting. It is tough, easy to wash, and is a reusable baking tool.

Special Design: The biscuit cutters are designed in various shapes with easy-cutting slice to ensure that both adults and teenagers can use them easily. In addition, they are. Each cutter is easy to use and clean.

Wide Application: These cookie cutters designed for baby products can be used to bake cookies, small cakes, etc. It is specially customized for The Baby Shower and is also suitable for birthdays or holiday parties. It can also be given to friends who like DIY cookies.

Creation Diy: The rolled fringe design of the cookie cutters shapes prevents finger cuts, , perfect for bakers, expectant mothers and party planners to carry out DIY baking projects and teenagers' cooking activities, enjoy the fun of making.
description: Specification: Color: sliver Material: safety stainless steel Product Size: as shown in the picture Package details: 7 x cookie cutters Note: Due to manual measurement, the size may have a certain error. Due to the difference between monitors, there may be a slight color difference.
